page_metadata.biotools__summary: CRNPRED is a program that predicts secondary structures (SS), contact numbers (CN), and residue-wise contact orders (RWCO) of a native protein structure from its amino acid sequence.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CRNPRED is a program that predicts secondary structures (SS), contact numbers (CN), and residue-wise contact orders (RWCO) of a native protein structure from its amino acid sequence.
